description:
Wacom Tablet Driver Software


- This driver supports the new Wacom Cintiq line of pen displays: Cintiq M, Cintiq L, Cintiq M Enterprise, Cintiq L Enterprise, Cintiq L touch, and Cintiq L Enterprise touch.
- Device Diagnostics are now easier to access and view.
- For Keyboard shortcuts, we added “NumLock” to the "Add special" drop-down list.
- Pop-up notifications — ExpressKey/Dial settings, Display toggle pop-up, Touch On/Off — can now be turned on or off in Advanced device settings.
